title: conyza australis
intro: Conyza australis, also known as fleabane or prickly leaf, is a perennial plant in the daisy family native to Australia and New Zealand. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health issues. Conyza australis has been used to alleviate respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as to treat digestive issues like diarrhea and ulcers. Herbal preparations of Conyza australis can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
